name: Mi Agrupacion Plus

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## New Features

### Admin Record Delete
- **Delete any record** from the detail view in RecordListModal
- Confirmation dialog before deletion
- Automatically cleans up associated photos
- Supabase sync auto-propagates deletions to remote

## Bug Fixes

### Sync/Authentication
- **Proactive token validation** on startup — detects expired sessions immediately instead of failing silently
- **api() no longer throws** for HTTP error responses — returns {status, json} for all responses, enabling proper error logging
- **Response body logged on 400** — helps debug Supabase REST API rejections
- **syncNow() method** validates token + approval before starting sync, preventing cascading failures
- **Sync button** now uses plugin.syncNow() instead of manual stop+start+push sequence
- **Retry preserves extraHeaders** — token refresh retry no longer drops Prefer headers

### Obsidian Plugin Review Compliance
- Fixed document -> ctiveDocument for popout window compatibility
- Removed unnecessary type assertion in chart-utils.ts
- Removed 10 unused imports in dashboard-view.ts
- Fixed Object.entries() returning ny — added explicit [string, T][] casts
- Fixed ScanResult imports to resolve directly from manager-scan (ESLint parser)
- Enabled 
oImplicitAny in tsconfig.json

## Files Changed
- src/modals/record-list-modal.ts — delete button with confirmation
- src/main.ts — proactive token validation, syncNow() method
- src/supabase/client.ts — api() error handling, Object.entries cast
- src/data/parser.ts — Object.entries cast
- src/settings/admin.ts, src/settings/auxiliar.ts — sync button uses syncNow()
- src/views/chart-utils.ts — activeDocument, removed assertion
- src/views/dashboard-kpis.ts — passes DataManager to RecordListModal
- src/views/general-view.ts — passes DataManager + onDeleted to RecordListModal
- Multiple files — ScanResult import path fixes, ESLint compliance
releases.name: v1.3.0 — Admin Delete + Sync Fixes

releases.author: jaliriogbarrios19
releases.description:
## Chart System Rewrite

### New Features
- **Interactive charts** powered by Chart.js — tooltips, legends, animations
- **Bar charts** (actual vs meta) for all 4 metric groups
- **Doughnut charts** — visit condition distribution, activity type distribution
- **Trend line charts** — monthly visits, monthly F19 within cycle
- **Theme-aware colors** from Obsidian CSS variables (respects light/dark themes)

### Architecture
- Centralized chart data computation in \chart-data.ts\ — eliminates code duplication across dashboard, general, resumen-srp, and campaña views
- \enderAllCharts()\ helper — single call renders all chart types
- Extracted \ uildCampanaBars()\ and \groupByMonth()\ helpers

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed Chart.js memory leaks — proper cleanup lifecycle in all views (re-render and close)
- Fixed Obsidian plugin review compliance: \h4\ → \Setting.setHeading()\
- Fixed tooltip percentage showing incorrectly on Meta dataset
- Added empty data guards — empty bar groups no longer render
- Added console.warn for invalid dates in trend computation

### Files Changed
- \src/views/chart-utils.ts\ — Chart.js renderer (bar, doughnut, trend, toggle, cleanup)
- \src/views/chart-data.ts\ — unified chart data computation
- All 4 views updated to use unified system
releases.name: v1.2.0 — Chart.js
